name: @akashic-contents/explosive-ohajiki-chain
description: ぶっこわしカーリング
author: DWANGO Co., Ltd.

scripts.build: rimraf ./script && tsc && akashic scan asset script
scripts.update: akashic scan asset && akashic scan globalScripts
scripts.export-zip: mkdirp dist/zip && akashic export zip -o dist/zip/game.zip --target-service nicolive --minify --hash-filename --force
scripts.export-html: rimraf dist/html && akashic export html -o dist/html
